Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Vedic food resources

Health · asked by user [] · 2007-08-25 · 6 answers
Who can provide me with quotes, stories, links, etc in relationship to food and nutrition from the Vedic and particularly Vaisnava perspective please.

all posts gratefully accepted

looking forward to your earliest replies
user [38] · 2007-08-25
Sorry, food research is not my focus. But Priyavrata P. (ffl.org) has a lot of info online.
user [2] · 2007-08-26
made a page in the wiki for you:
http://wiki.pariprashnena.com/index.php?title=Vedic_Food_Resources
user [75] · 2007-08-26
shouldnt this rather be "Kali-yuga Food Resources"? i dont think that people in vedic times had these problems with their food ...
user [40] · 2007-08-26
Good on you Mishra I will fill that up with some things

Phani: Mebbe Kali Yuga, etc, can be a sub heading, it is one of the aspects people should have information on if they are interested in food from a Vedic perspective.

What do you think? I am making that up as I go.

Oh it didnttake long so I had a bash at it already. what do you think

http://wiki.pariprashnena.com/index.php?title=Vedic_Food_Resources
